text: The relentless increase in duck noises unsettles me. In this brightly lit and sharply modern space—sterile, glassy—a strange absurdity unfolds. The incongruity of the animal sound with the calculated seriousness of research and development disorients me, amplifying a sense of being out of place. I feel my awareness of self sharpen, tinged with an awkward amusement and a search for meaning in the chaos.
